operator_view:
Governance lens review completes with ACCEPT verdict. The remediation plan meets all stated constraints: no protected governance paths are touched, fail-closed behavior is required, and repo-clean/no-orphans invariants are preserved. The plan scope (deterministic challenger validation, task-spec contract linting, steward diff preflight, attempt ledger automation, state/plan consistency) represents appropriate module-level remediation with moderate reversibility. 

Key action items for execution: (1) ensure acceptance criteria are concrete and testable before implementation begins, (2) verify input validation on all automated linting/validation paths, (3) implement atomic operations for ledger continuity. No escalation required - plan is ready for execution approval.

operator_view:
Governance lens review completes with ACCEPT verdict. The remediation plan meets all stated constraints: no protected governance paths are touched, fail-closed behavior is required, and repo-clean/no-orphans invariants are preserved. The plan scope (deterministic challenger validation, task-spec contract linting, steward diff preflight, attempt ledger automation, state/plan consistency) represents appropriate module-level remediation with moderate reversibility.
